title: Now Hiring Production Engineer at Hindustan Unilever Global Group

jsonLd.title: Now Hiring Production Engineer at Hindustan Unilever Global Group
jsonLd.description:
We at Hindustan Unilever Global Group are looking for an experienced Production Engineer based out of Vijayawada. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Hindustan Unilever Global Group:
Hindustan Unilever Global Group is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Ensure product quality meets internal and customer specifications
• Implement 5S, Kaizen, and Six Sigma practices on the shop floor
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Life and accident insurance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Hindustan Unilever Global Group!
